title: You're Paying $270 to File Taxes — When It's Free
hook: Sixty million Americans pay a tax preparer an average of $270 — for a service the IRS provides completely free.
angle: The tax prep industry lobbied Congress for years to kill free government filing — and most people have no idea the free option exists
audience: Anyone earning under $79,000 who pays TurboTax, H&R Block, or a local preparer for a basic return
key_numbers: $79,000 income threshold for IRS Free File
